mapper.select: SELECT e.EMPNO , e.LEVELNO , e.CLASSNO , e.MAILNO , e.NAME , e.INTELNO , e.HOSTNAME , e.NOTREMOVE , e.EMP_ORDER , e.DOWNLOAD , e.LEVELDATE , e.TITLE , e.EXIST , e.IPADDR , e.M_COUNT , e.EXFAXNO , e.MOBILE_PHN , e.JIKGUB_NAME , e.VPN_YN , e.USER_GUBUN , e.DEPTNO , e.EXTELNO , d.DEPT_NAME FROM EMPLOYEE e INNER JOIN DEPT d ON e.DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO WHERE e.EMPNO = #{empno}

SELECT LEVEL, MENU_NAME , MENU_CODE, MENU_NO, UP_MENU_NO, MENU_URL, COMPONENT , LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(MENU_NAME, ' > '), ' > ') AS MENU_PATH , CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF AS IS_LEAF , MENU_IMAGE , MENU_CODE || MENU_NO AS MENU_CODE_NO , TOP_NO, TOP_MENU_LIST, USE_YN FROM MENU_LIST WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND MENU_CODE != 'SM'
START WITH UP_MENU_NO IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_NO = UP_MENU_NO ORDER SIBLINGS BY MENU_NO

SELECT MENU_CODE, MENU_NO FROM
MENU_AUTH
MENU_LIST
WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND DEPTNO = #{deptno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOGINHISTORY (EMP_ID, EMP_NAME, LOGIN_DATE, IPADDR) VALUES (#{empId}, #{empName}, SYSDATE, #{ipaddr})

MERGE INTO LOGINHISTORY t USING ( SELECT #{empId} AS EMP_ID, #{empName} AS EMP_NAME, #{ipaddr} AS IPADDR FROM dual ) s ON (t.EMP_ID = s.EMP_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.EMP_NAME = s.EMP_NAME, t.IPADDR = s.IPADDR, t.LOGIN_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (EMP_ID, EMP_NAME, LOGIN_DATE, IPADDR) VALUES (s.EMP_ID, s.EMP_NAME, SYSDATE, s.IPADDR)

MERGE INTO MENU_COUNT t USING ( SELECT TO_CHAR(#{menuNo}) AS MENU_NO FROM DUAL ) s ON ( t.MENU_CODE = s.MENU_NO AND t.REG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.MENU_COUNT = NVL(t.MENU_COUNT, 0) + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MENU_CODE, REG_DT, MENU_COUNT) VALUES (s.MENU_NO, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)

MERGE INTO MENU_COUNT t USING ( SELECT MENU_NO FROM ( SELECT ml.MENU_NO FROM MENU_LIST ml WHERE ml.MENU_URL = #{menuUrl} ORDER BY ml.MENU_NO ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) s ON ( t.MENU_CODE = s.MENU_NO AND t.REG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.MENU_COUNT = t.MENU_COUNT + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MENU_CODE, REG_DT, MENU_COUNT) VALUES (s.MENU_NO, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)
mapper.select: SELECT ROWNUM AS NO , EMP_ID, EMP_NAME, IPADDR , TO_CHAR(LOGIN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LOGIN_DATE , MAX_CNT , CEIL(MAX_CNT / #{pagePerRow} ) AS TOTAL_PAGE FROM ( SELECT EMP_ID, EMP_NAME, LOGIN_DATE, IPADDR , COUNT(*) OVER() AS MAX_CNT FROM LOGINHISTORY WHERE 1 = 1 --AND EMP_ID IS NULL -- 테스트 ORDER BY LOGIN_DATE DESC ) OFFSET (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{pagePerRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pagePerRow} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MENU_LIST ( MENU_CODE , MENU_NO , MENU_NAME , MENU_LEVEL , UP_MENU_NO , MENU_URL , MENU_IMAGE , USE_YN , TOP_MENU_LIST , TOP_NO) VALUES (#{menuCode} , #{menuNo} , #{menuName} , #{menuLevel} , #{upMenuNo} ,#{menuUrl} , #{menuImage} , #{useYn} , #{topMenuList}, #{topNo})

MERGE INTO MENU_LIST t USING ( SELECT #{menuCode} AS MENU_CODE, #{menuNo} AS MENU_NO, #{menuName} AS MENU_NAME, #{menuLevel} AS MENU_LEVEL, #{upMenuNo} AS UP_MENU_NO, #{menuUrl} AS MENU_URL, #{menuImage} AS MENU_IMAGE, #{useYn} AS USE_YN, #{topMenuList} AS TOP_MENU_LIST, #{topNo} AS TOP_NO FROM DUAL ) s ON ( t.MENU_CODE = s.MENU_CODE AND t.MENU_NO = s.MENU_NO ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.MENU_NAME = s.MENU_NAME , t.MENU_LEVEL = s.MENU_LEVEL , t.UP_MENU_NO = s.UP_MENU_NO , t.MENU_URL = s.MENU_URL , t.MENU_IMAGE = s.MENU_IMAGE , t.USE_YN = s.USE_YN , t.TOP_MENU_LIST= s.TOP_MENU_LIST , t.TOP_NO = s.TOP_NO WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( MENU_CODE , MENU_NO , MENU_NAME , MENU_LEVEL , UP_MENU_NO , MENU_URL , MENU_IMAGE, USE_YN , TOP_MENU_LIST , TOP_NO ) VALUES ( s.MENU_CODE, s.MENU_NO , s.MENU_NAME , s.MENU_LEVEL , s.UP_MENU_NO , s.MENU_URL , s.MENU_IMAGE , s.USE_YN , s.TOP_MENU_LIST , s.TOP_NO )
mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CODE, MENU_NO, MENU_NAME, MENU_LEVEL, UP_MENU_NO, MENU_URL, MENU_IMAGE, USE_YN, TOP_MENU_LIST, TOP_NO FROM MENU_LIST WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY MENU_CODE, MENU_NO
